name: The cross foretold
notes: This weave gathers the Old Testament words that foretold the crucifixion and joins them to the very verses where they were fulfilled at Calvary. The links are the explicit scriptural citations the Gospel writers themselves make ('that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophet') together with the witness the New Testament elsewhere applies to the cross. The suffering of Psalm 22 and Psalm 69, the pierced one of Zechariah 12, the unbroken Passover lamb of Exodus 12 and Psalm 34, and the transgressor's portion of Isaiah 53 are seen here written long beforehand and answered in precise detail. Each account keeps its own vantage upon the scene, yet all bear one testimony: the Word of God spoke the cross before it came to pass, and not one word fell to the ground.
